description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS Build that triggers on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for building on macOS and another for sending a notification to Discord on failure. The build job should check out the repository, install dependencies, install Boost, configure CMake, and then build the project. The notify job should run on ubuntu-20.04, gather environmental variables, and use a Discord webhook to send a notification with details about the failure.
